title: Mid-Level Plant Manager at Shree Cement

jsonLd.title: Mid-Level Plant Manager at Shree Cement
jsonLd.description:
We at Shree Cement are looking for an experienced Plant Manager based out of Faridabad. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Shree Cement:
Shree Cement is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Root Cause Analysis
• Proficiency in ISO 9001
• Proficiency in Six Sigma
• Proficiency in PPAP
• Proficiency in 5S
• Proficiency in GD&T
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Faridabad, Haryana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Shree Cement!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
